data.body: STATE: implemented + pushed (change 664) but BLOCKED on an escalated design finding; ticket status reads 'blocked'. verify-opcert merge-gate is built (src/rebar/_commands/verify_opcert.py + _cli intercept + verify-identity.yaml op-cert step + CI-trigger audit + config), held-out TDD 8/8, on the current-main-rebased stack. Material-half authoritative-input fix LANDED (recompute material via current_material_fingerprint; require merged_log_commit ancestor-of-HEAD). OPEN (owner: do not decide now — ESCALATED): the ERA-ANCHOR finding (verify_opcert.py:204) — era key-validity is checked at the cert's self-chosen merged_log_commit, so a revoked/not-yet-added env key can bind a pre-revocation commit and verify. Fork: A=era-at-HEAD (self-contained) vs B=independent authoritative anchor (needs ee0b produce side). To be resolved holistically with ee0b/8f1d by the stronger model. LLM-Review currently -1 on this finding.
